name: H1 + body_text mandatory before first ##
description: Every new wiki page must include a 1–2 sentence description between H1 header and first subheading (##). This ensures that rebuild-meta.sh / extract_summary() always finds clean text for summary.
pattern: Entity description — one or two sentences that define it in plain language.

validation_rules.rule: no_body_text_between_h1_and_first_subheading → HALT_AND_FIX: agent must add a summary paragraph before any ## sections
body_text_must_not_be_markdown_only — lines like '**text**' or '*italic*' do not count as body text

agent_instruction: When creating a new page: after frontmatter and H1 immediately write 1–2 sentence description. Then → ## Definition, followed by sections per template.

name: Docs page: intro paragraph + nav header mandatory
description: Alternative pattern for docs category pages. Uses intro paragraph instead of body_text between H1 and ##; requires navigation header (prev/next/index links) and See Also section.
pattern: Brief intro paragraph defining scope, audience, and purpose — 2-3 sentences in plain language.

validation_rules.rule: intro_paragraph_required → HALT_AND_FIX: agent must add a 2-3 sentence overview before any ## sections
nav_header_mandatory → every doc page must have prev/next/index links at top (except docs-index.md)
see_also_section_required → every doc page must end with ## See Also section linking к wiki/entities/ и wiki/concepts/

agent_instruction: When creating docs category pages: after frontmatter and H1 write intro paragraph (not body_text). Add navigation header at top. End with ## See Also linking к related entity/concept pages.
